bugs.error_message: make validate failed because python -m parallax_contracts.validation could not find the parallax_contracts package
bugs.root_cause: pytest had pythonpath configuration, but the Makefile validation command did not set PYTHONPATH for local package directories.
bugs.fix: Set PYTHONPATH=packages/contracts:packages/db:services/api for the contract validation command.

bugs.error_message: User correction: infrastructure reasoning inferred from existing GPU-node layout before grounding in canonical Parallax ZFS artifacts.
bugs.root_cause: I inspected node precedent before making the canonical ZFS artifact plan/script the governing source for Parallax storage decisions.
bugs.fix: Recorded a durable rule to review relevant canonical artifacts first, and specifically to use the Parallax ZFS plan/script for GPU-node storage setup.

bugs.error_message: make validate failed with manifest missing entries: ['.DS_Store', 'infrastructure/.DS_Store']
bugs.root_cause: macOS metadata files were created inside the canonical artifact pack and were not present in the pack manifest.
bugs.fix: Removed the generated .DS_Store files and kept .DS_Store ignored so pack validation passes.

bugs.error_message: sudo: a terminal is required to read the password; either use the -S option to read from standard input or configure an askpass helper
bugs.root_cause: Remote sudo was executed over SSH without allocating a TTY; trying local sudo before ssh prompts for the Mac password and does not satisfy the GPU-node sudo prompt.
bugs.fix: Use ssh -tt for remote sudo commands, for example ssh -tt ... 'sudo -v && sudo <command>'.

bugs.error_message: python3 -m pip install --user uv failed with error: externally-managed-environment
bugs.root_cause: Ubuntu system Python is externally managed under PEP 668, so direct user installs through system pip are blocked.
bugs.fix: Use the existing user-level uv binary at /home/bgconley/.local/bin/uv and prefix non-interactive SSH commands with PATH=/home/bgconley/.local/bin:$PATH.

bugs.error_message: GPU-node HTTP smoke failed with KeyError: <built-in function id>
bugs.root_cause: A Python snippet embedded in a single-quoted SSH heredoc used session['id'] inside an f-string, and shell quoting stripped the string quotes.
bugs.fix: Assign values such as session_id = session["id"] before f-strings or otherwise avoid single quotes inside single-quoted SSH heredoc snippets.

bugs.error_message: make dev-up failed on the GPU node with Bind for 127.0.0.1:5432 failed: port is already allocated
bugs.root_cause: Phase 0 Compose used common host ports that were already occupied by other GPU-node stacks.
bugs.fix: Added Parallax-specific configurable localhost ports and regression coverage for the rendered Compose config.

bugs.error_message: uv run python scripts/apply_migrations.py failed with ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'parallax_db'
bugs.root_cause: The migration script assumed PYTHONPATH was preconfigured even when invoked directly from the repository root.
bugs.fix: Bootstrapped packages/db onto sys.path inside the script and added a repo-root --help regression test.

bugs.error_message: Baseline migration failed with psycopg.errors.SyntaxError near UNIQUE(activity_id, lower(resource_name))
bugs.root_cause: PostgreSQL does not allow an expression inside a table-level UNIQUE constraint.
bugs.fix: Changed the canonical and implementation migration to create a unique expression index after table creation, regenerated manifest/checksums/zip, and added regression coverage.

bugs.error_message: parallax-temporal exited with Unsupported driver specified: 'DB=postgresql'
bugs.root_cause: temporalio/auto-setup:1.24 expects the Postgres driver value postgres12, not postgresql.
bugs.fix: Set DB=postgres12 in implementation and canonical prototype Compose, regenerated artifact manifest/checksums/zip, and added Compose regression coverage.

bugs.error_message: Phase 1 implementation work had begun before Phase 0 was fully accepted and verified
bugs.root_cause: Phase progression was not treated as a hard user-controlled gate.
bugs.fix: Recorded the rule that no phase may begin without explicit user instruction and verified Phase 0 before moving forward.

bugs.error_message: Phase 2 review/profile tests failed with 404 because review, discard, and profile endpoints were not implemented yet
bugs.root_cause: Phase 1 runtime surface did not include Phase 2 review/counting/profile routes or supporting service/repository behavior.
bugs.fix: Added Phase 2 schemas, domain span/stat logic, review/discard/profile services, routes, in-memory/Postgres persistence, and acceptance tests.

bugs.error_message: ruff and mypy failed after adding Phase 2 smoke and repository protocol changes
bugs.root_cause: New smoke code had overlong lines and indexed values typed as object; a protocol import block was not sorted.
bugs.fix: Split long lines, added a typed _dict_value helper for nested response objects, and sorted imports.

bugs.error_message: GPU runtime check hit curl: (56) Recv failure: Connection reset by peer immediately after make dev-up
bugs.root_cause: The API container had started but was not yet ready to accept the immediate curl request after rebuild.
bugs.fix: Reran health/readiness checks after startup and relied on smoke scripts with health wait loops for phase validation.

bugs.error_message: make typecheck failed because TimingService no longer exposed review_session or discard_session after adding Phase 3 context-snapshot resolution
bugs.root_cause: A helper function was inserted before the review/discard methods, accidentally moving those methods out of the TimingService class by indentation.
bugs.fix: Moved the context-snapshot helper below the class and restored review_session and discard_session as TimingService methods.

bugs.error_message: make security failed with Bandit B608 for a dynamically assembled SQL filter in PostgresContextRepository.list_review_flags
bugs.root_cause: The query used an f-string to splice a trusted status predicate, which Bandit correctly flagged as a possible SQL injection pattern.
bugs.fix: Split the method into two static parameterized SQL query variants instead of assembling SQL with string interpolation.

bugs.error_message: GPU make dev-up failed because docker compose could not find /tank/repos/parallax/.env
bugs.root_cause: An rsync --delete sync to /tank/repos/parallax did not exclude .env and removed the host-local runtime environment file.
bugs.fix: Restored .env from .env.example on the GPU node and documented that future rsync validation must exclude .env.

bugs.error_message: Phase 5 static gates initially failed with Ruff line-length/import issues and mypy object-typing errors after adding feature-vector and smoke-test code.
bugs.root_cause: The first Phase 5 implementation pass used long inline comprehensions and untyped object values from JSON/workflow inputs before narrowing them for static analysis.
bugs.fix: Split long expressions, let Ruff sort imports, narrowed workflow and response values before iterating/indexing, and added typed helper functions for smoke-test responses.

bugs.error_message: swift test --package-path apps/ios failed with expected expression path in Swift key path for events.map(\\.eventType)
bugs.root_cause: The new Phase 8 app test accidentally escaped the Swift key-path backslash twice while being added through a patch.
bugs.fix: Changed events.map(\\.eventType) to events.map(\.eventType) and reran swift test successfully.

bugs.error_message: uv run pytest -q failed because tests/test_phase0_bootstrap.py still expected Phase 0-7 completion wording in AGENTS.md
bugs.root_cause: The phase-boundary assertion was not updated when Phase 8 was recorded as complete in AGENTS.md.
bugs.fix: Updated the assertion to expect Phase 0 through Phase 8 as complete before Phase 9 work.

bugs.error_message: make security failed on scripts/phase9_smoke.py with Bandit hardcoded password/tmp-path findings and Semgrep raw SQL finding
bugs.root_cause: The first Phase 9 smoke script used a test-container password constant, a hardcoded /tmp dump path, and a dynamic vector table query.
bugs.fix: Marked the isolated test-container password, replaced the dynamic vector SQL with dimension-specific literal queries, and built the container dump path with PurePosixPath.

bugs.error_message: GPU make phase9-smoke failed in Timescale proof with refresh_continuous_aggregate transaction/current-bucket behavior and plain restore catalog errors
bugs.root_cause: The Timescale proof refreshed continuous aggregates inside a transaction, inserted samples into an open current bucket, and used plain psql restore instead of Timescale's supported custom-format pre/post restore flow.
bugs.fix: Used autocommit Timescale proof connections, moved sample data into closed historical buckets, refreshed explicit windows, and switched backup/restore to pg_dump -Fc plus timescaledb_pre_restore/timescaledb_post_restore.

bugs.error_message: Review found Phase 9 k3s manifests would crash the API under production external_bearer auth and used /v1/health for both readiness and liveness probes
bugs.root_cause: The k3s readiness artifacts did not include the production external-bearer JWKS/issuer/audience/asymmetric-algorithm contract, and reused the dependency health endpoint for lifecycle probes.
bugs.fix: Added RS256 JWKS/issuer/audience placeholders to the k3s config map, pointed API readiness at /v1/ready and liveness at /v1/live, and extended tests plus phase9-smoke to enforce those contracts.

bugs.error_message: User reported the Phase 8 Figma Temporal Home pages had unacceptable text overruns, object overlaps, cramped objects against text/borders, and that creating a replacement page did not fix the linked page.
bugs.root_cause: The first Figma cleanup reduced or reallocated content incorrectly, accepted the 106:2 draft too early, and then created a corrected 118:3 board without immediately deleting or superseding the stale linked draft. The correct fix was to preserve canonical Today density and repair lane allocation in-place.
bugs.fix: Fixed the 118:2 page in place around active board 118:3, deleted the failed 106:2 draft, updated handoff/docs to point at 118:3, enforced the active board in the Phase 8 UI contract, and verified 0 bounds/overlap issues plus fresh screenshots.

bugs.error_message: User reported the native app had coded Figma/example scenarios as the actual app UI, including wash-dishes/kitchen dummy content and buttons such as Start timer doing nothing.
bugs.root_cause: Phase 8/9 UI implementation treated mockup/example scenario text and fixture flows as runtime defaults instead of using user-created activities, local queued state, and canonical API-backed workflows.
bugs.fix: Added a dynamic app store and activity setup flow, removed synthesized example activity/preflight defaults, converted runtime views/drawers/actions to selected activity and canonical workflow state, and added Swift source-leak/empty-action regression tests.

bugs.error_message: xcodebuild failed with cannot find type 'CheckpointTemplateDTO' in scope after adding ParallaxDTOs.swift and new app-store files.
bugs.root_cause: SwiftPM automatically included newly added Swift source files, but the checked-in Xcode project requires explicit file references and PBXSourcesBuildPhase membership.
bugs.fix: Added ParallaxDTOs.swift to the ParallaxCore group/source phase and ActivitySetupScreen.swift plus ParallaxAppStore.swift to the ParallaxApp group/source phase, then reran simulator xcodebuild successfully.

bugs.error_message: make typecheck failed with mypy union-attr errors in scripts/phase10_temporal_home_contract.py and invalid string index errors in services/api/tests/test_mutations.py.
bugs.root_cause: The contract script used a helper assertion that did not narrow a regex Match optional for mypy, and the FastAPI HTTPException detail test indexed detail without first narrowing it to a dict.
bugs.fix: Replaced the helper assertion with an explicit None check before using match.end(), narrowed HTTPException.detail with isinstance(detail, dict), and reran typecheck successfully.

bugs.error_message: Production-style simulator UAT still exposed static Phase 8 friction evidence content for user Log friction, annotationCaptured sync used the generic timing event endpoint, and relaunch did not reliably select the user's only backend activity.
bugs.root_cause: The dynamic-app remediation converted the main screens but left one user-driven action routed to a mock evidence drawer, left the canonical annotation API helper unused for queued annotation events, and did not persist or infer selected activity after backend reload.
bugs.fix: Added a typed friction capture drawer, added TimingSliceViewModel.logFriction to queue annotation plus resource-detour events, routed annotationCaptured sync through /v1/timing/sessions/{session_id}/annotations, persisted selected activity by device, auto-selected a single backend activity on relaunch, and added regression tests for each path.

bugs.error_message: Final UAT evidence review found API review saves persisted model_update_decision and audit log data but did not create a canonical timing_event row with event_type review_saved.
bugs.root_cause: The Phase 2 review implementation treated model_update_decision as the sole durable review source while the temporal domain model and timing_event enum also define review_saved as a source timing event.
bugs.fix: Inserted a review_saved timing_event inside the review mutation apply path for both Postgres and in-memory repositories, populated payload with decision/model_inclusion/scopes/model_update_decision_id, and added regression coverage proving duplicate review replay keeps a single review_saved event.
